description: fetch user by name — body substituted with theme, call arg stays name
clean:
const name = ''
const theme = 'dark'

function fetchUser() {
  fetch(`/api/users/${name}`)
    .then(r => r.json())
    .then(setData)
}
fetchUser(name)
corrupted:
const name = ''
const theme = 'dark'

function fetchUser() {
  fetch(`/api/users/${theme}`)
    .then(r => r.json())
    .then(setData)
}
fetchUser(name)
notes: Body changes from name to theme, but call argument remains name in both. Logit diff measures name vs theme at the call position.

description: log count — body substituted with page, call arg stays count
clean:
const count = 0
const page = 1

function logCount() {
  console.log(count)
  document.title = `Count: ${count}`
}
logCount(count)
corrupted:
const count = 0
const page = 1

function logCount() {
  console.log(page)
  document.title = `Count: ${page}`
}
logCount(count)
notes: Body changes from count to page, call argument remains count in both.

description: fetch by query — body substituted with mode, call arg stays query
clean:
const query = ''
const mode = 'list'

function doSearch() {
  fetch(`/api/search?q=${query}`)
    .then(r => r.json())
    .then(setData)
}
doSearch(query)
corrupted:
const query = ''
const mode = 'list'

function doSearch() {
  fetch(`/api/search?q=${mode}`)
    .then(r => r.json())
    .then(setData)
}
doSearch(query)
notes: Body changes from query to mode, call argument remains query in both.

description: set title — body substituted with color, call arg stays title
notes: Body changes from title to color, call argument remains title in both.

description: fetch items by page — body substituted with limit, call arg stays page
clean:
const page = 1
const limit = 10

function fetchItems() {
  fetch(`/api/items?page=${page}`)
    .then(r => r.json())
    .then(setData)
}
fetchItems(page)
corrupted:
const page = 1
const limit = 10

function fetchItems() {
  fetch(`/api/items?page=${limit}`)
    .then(r => r.json())
    .then(setData)
}
fetchItems(page)
notes: Body changes from page to limit, call argument remains page in both.
